violations.text: The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Raw animal foods (chicken) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (bread) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Guidance document provided. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener should be sanitized after every use. Can opener placed in 3-bay Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

Empanadas were observed held less than 135 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Empanadas were in unit for about 3 hours. Empanadas were disposed of. Unit was observed set at 122 degrees. Unit turned up to 158 degrees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

Eggs are served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026
Flour and food storage containers were observed stored on the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026

The ice machine is lacking an air gap (Draining into hand sink). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2026
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Self closing hinges were on site, just needs to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2026
The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

Empanadas was observed held at 127 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Empanadas were reheated. Proper hot holding procedures reviewed with PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
A glue fly trap was observed stored above food prep area. Food shall be protected from potential contamination. Fly trap moved. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
Knives were being stored underneath prep unit cutting boards. Utensils must be stored on a clean protected location. Knives relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be cleaned by end of day. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
A handle for the handsink in the front prep area was missing. System must be maintained in good repair. Per PIC, handle has been purchased. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The ceiling in the kitchen area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Several tiles were observed water damaged. Tiles to be replaced with approved material. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The sandwich prep unit in the kitchen was observed holding an ambient temperature of 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit is not in service and is pending a maintenance repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/24/2023

Empanadas were observed held at 70 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was made 2 hours prior to visit and kept in hot-hold unit. Food was moved to refrigeration to be rapidly cooled and to be reheated per order. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2023

The sandwich prep unit in the kitchen was observed holding an ambient temperature of 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit is not in service and is pending a maintenance repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/10/2023
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023
